opportunities.caption:
📍 Just Sold | 20848 Pacific Coast Hwy | 
Offered at $3,300,000 

Grateful to have represented the seller of this extraordinary post-fire rebuild opportunity: a prime beachfront lot boasting pristine frontage on one of Malibu’s most secluded and coveted stretches Las Flores Beach. Wake to panoramic whitewater vistas sweeping across Santa Monica Bay, with world-class surf breaks literally steps from your door. This blank-slate parcel offers the rare chance to craft your dream coastal retreat.

#MalibuRealEstate #beach #justsold #ModernLuxury

opportunities.comment: Blank canvas on Las Flores—perfect for a climate-responsive coastal build. The structural challenges there (salt spray, seismic) demand thoughtful materials. Curious what vision emerged for the site.

opportunities.caption:
Not all homes fit into a standard insurance box—and that’s exactly where I come in.

I specialize in High-Value Homes and High-Risk Properties throughout California, helping homeowners in Rancho Santa Fe, Dana Point, Laguna Beach, Pacific Palisades, Newport Coast, Malibu, Beverly Hills, La Jolla, and beyond secure the right coverage while often saving thousands of dollars a year.

From luxury estates and custom-built homes to properties impacted by wildfire and coastal exposures, I help clients navigate today’s challenging insurance market with confidence.

My goal isn’t just to sell a policy—it’s to be a trusted resource and advocate for my clients, making sure they have the protection they need when it matters most.

If you’re a homeowner, real estate professional, wealth advisor, or simply looking for a second opinion on your current insurance program, I’d love to connect.

I’m not your average insurance agent. I specialize in solutions where others often say no. #luxuryhomes #california #maliburealestate #ranchosantafe #highnetworth

opportunities.caption:
Perched high above the shimmering lights of Los Angeles, this architectural masterpiece blends bold modern lines with an infinite horizon. Featuring monumental high ceilings and a seamless terrace that dissolves into the deep violet twilight, it represents the ultimate pinnacle of California luxury living. 

Designed by ~ aiforarchitects 

#ModernArchitecture #LuxuryRealEstateLA #ContemporaryDesign #architecturalexcellence
opportunities.caption_excerpt: Perched high above the shimmering lights of Los Angeles, this architectural masterpiece blends bold modern lines with an infinite horizon. Featuring monumental high ceilings and a seamless terrace that dissolves into the deep violet twiligh…
opportunities.comment: The scale here is striking—those ceiling heights and terrace integration are hallmarks of thoughtful modern design. Curious about the structural approach; exposed concrete can amplify that sense of volume beautifully.

opportunities.caption:
Brutalistische woning in beton en baksteen met uitzicht over een meer via grote aluminium raampartijen die de grens tussen binnen en buiten doen vervagen. Toch slaagde de architect erin om een warme en intieme woonsfeer te creëren. ⁠
⁠
Zichtbeton, karaktervolle Wasserstrich-baksteen en natuurlijke materialen geven de woning haar sterke identiteit. Grote glaspartijen halen het landschap naar binnen, terwijl natuursteen, hout en maatwerk zorgen voor een warme en rustige woonbeleving. ⁠
⁠
Architect @ArchitectsInMotion⁠
Fotografie @hendrikbiegs⁠
baksteen @wienerbergerbelgium⁠
buitenschrijnwerk @BeerseAluminiumWerken⁠
@gira.belgie schakelaars⁠
@gaggenauofficial keukentoestellen ⁠
⁠
#brutalistarchitecture #concretearchitecture #lakehousearch #contemporaryresidential #hasselt
opportunities.caption_excerpt:

⁠
Zich…
opportunities.comment: The warmth you've drawn from raw concrete and materiality here is exactly what we chase—brutalism doesn't have to feel cold when the detailing respects the landscape and inhabitation.

opportunities.caption:
California’s statewide median hit an all-time high in April. Los Angeles County moved in the opposite direction. That divergence is worth understanding before making any decision in this market.

Active listings in LA climbed 6.8% year-over-year to 18,482 homes. Supply is up, pricing pressure is real, and the leverage that sellers held in 2021 and 2022 has quietly shifted. Well priced homes are still moving in under three weeks. Overpriced ones are sitting.

No crash is forming, most homeowners carry substantial equity and have no reason to sell at a loss. What is changing is the balance of power between buyers and sellers. If you want to know what that means for your specific zip code, reach out directly.

.
.
.
.
.
#ErfanEstates 
#LuxuryRealEstateLA 
#LALuxuryHomes 
#LosAngelesRealEstate 
#SoCalRealEstate

opportunities.caption:
Soft textures, sculptural forms, and natural light defining this moment in our finished Beverly Hills project. Designed to feel calm, refined, and effortlessly livable, every detail was layered with warmth, balance, and timeless simplicity in mind.⁠

#AEA_Projects
opportunities.caption_excerpt: Soft textures, sculptural forms, and natural light defining this moment in our finished Beverly Hills project. Designed to feel calm, refined, and effortlessly livable, every detail was layered with warmth, balance, and timeless simplicity …
opportunities.comment: The layering of texture and light you've achieved here—that restraint with warmth—pairs beautifully with concrete's raw honesty. How do you approach material selection when calm and timeless are the brief?

opportunities.caption: Architecture 🇮🇹♥️
opportunities.comment: The proportions here—clean lines meeting those classical volumes. Italian typology never gets old. How's the concrete detailing on the facade?

opportunities.caption:
Designed for gathering, unwinding, and embracing the ease of coastal living.

With seamless transitions between interior and exterior spaces, every home is thoughtfully connected to Malibu’s natural beauty.

opportunities.comment: The indoor-outdoor flow is crucial in Malibu—especially when concrete's thermal mass and clean lines can frame those views without competing with them. How are you approaching the material palette?
